full_text:
Chang Xia (Maoni) 常洽 (茂尼)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chang Xia (常洽), styledMaoni (茂尼), was born in Shu. Claimed that Li Jue would not harm Zhao Wen. Killed during Emperor Xian’s flight. Chang Xia was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Chang Xia lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
